'''Klak''' was a type of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] considered a delicacy by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Servings of fried Klak were among a buffet served at the [[Wedding of Chewbacca and Mallatobuck|wedding]] of Wookiees [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck]]<ref name="Dawn" /> in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].<ref name="timeline">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=222689&start=02265#15031920|thread=Books, Comics, & Television VIPs|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-06-14|time=1:08 PM|quote=Lumpy's birth year is approximately 1 BBY.}} — ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' states that [[Lumpawaroo/Legends|Lumpawaroo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca's]] son with [[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck]], was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after their [[Wedding of Chewbacca and Mallatobuck|wedding]]. [[Leland Chee]] confirms on the aforementioned Message Boards post that Lumpawaroo was born in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].</ref> A [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] deemed the dish one of several there that were suitable for consumption by his species even though most Wookiee dishes were spicy enough to damage his [[Stomach/Legends|stomach]].<ref name="Dawn" />

==Behind the scenes==
Klak appeared in ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'', a [[1998]] novel that was the third volume of [[The Han Solo Trilogy (hardcover)|''The Han Solo Trilogy'']] by [[A. C. Crispin]].<ref name="Dawn" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
